title: 12 tests, well beyond the >=3 required
evidence: app_test.go: 12 Test* funcs covering CRUD happy paths plus 400/404 edge cases (missing title/author, not-found, non-numeric id)

title: Idiomatic score low (0.38) despite clean build
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.38 while code_quality=0.956; likely from single-file layout and inline SQL in handlers
suggestion: Cosmetic; acceptable for a task this size.

title: SQLite path hardcoded to ./books.db
suggestion: Read the DB path from an env var to ease deployment/testing.

title: Tests mutate the shared package-global db
evidence: app_test.go:18 setupTestDB assigns the global db to test_books.db; parallel test execution would race
suggestion: Inject db per-handler or guard against t.Parallel(); harmless while tests run serially.
